codes.EXECUTION_ENRICHMENT_STOP:CORPORATE_ACTI: split/dividend/merger/cash+stock/cash-acquisition not resolvable to a registered adjusted open (fail closed)
codes.EXECUTION_ENRICHMENT_STOP:IDENTITY_CONFL: symbol/permanent-security transition or non-injective identity at execution (fail closed; no post-hoc winner)
codes.EXECUTION_ENRICHMENT_STOP:NO_OFFICIAL_OP: no official open at t+1 (fail closed; no fallback price)
codes.EXECUTION_ENRICHMENT_STOP:PRICE_CONFLICT: missing or conflicting open prices; adjusted-vs-unadjusted identity mismatch; calendar mismatch (execution session != registered next session)
codes.EXECUTION_ENRICHMENT_STOP:TRADING_HALT: t+1 halt / no execution session (fail closed)
codes.EXECUTION_ENRICHMENT_SUCCESS: official next-open t+1 attached; decision record bound; no future info
codes.INTEGRITY_STOP:FUTURE_INFORMATION_DETECT: any t+1 fact that would inject information after close t

invariant: each code has exactly one terminal treatment, no silent fallback, one census category, one reconciliation path; enrichment codes are never reused for signal-production failures
